title: organization — HTTP routes
description: Tenant-plane CRUD + hierarchy management + status transitions. Platform-plane read-only cross-tenant observability. Every mutation goes through the OrganizationPolicy + fires the corresponding event + invalidates tree caches.

groups.name: tenant-organizations
groups.description: Tenant-facing Organization CRUD. Reads open to any tenant member; writes require owner/admin.

routes.description: List Organizations for the current tenant. filter[status], filter[parent_id] (with `parent_id=null` for root-only), filter[category], filter[has_descendants], filter[is_default] supported. Default sort: sort_order ASC, then name ASC. Includes: parent, children, ancestors, descendants.

Create a new Organization. Body: { name, slug?, short_name?, description?, category, parent_id?, primary_color?, secondary_color?, logo_url?, website_url?, support_email?, support_phone?, contact_person_name?, established_date?, sort_order? }. Consumes organization_slot. Nesting requires organization_hierarchy. Branding fields require organization_branding.
Full tenant tree (flat list of all rows with parent_id + tree_path + tree_depth). Cached at `org:tree:{tenant_id}` for 15m. Sorted so parents precede children.
Retrieve a single Organization. `?include=parent,children,ancestors,descendants,siblings` for related rows.

Update mutable fields. parent_id changes MUST go through the /reparent endpoint (this route refuses parent_id in the body). is_default flips MUST go through /set-default. Branding-field writes require organization_branding entitlement.
Soft-delete + status=archived. Refused on is_default OR has_descendants OR referenced_by_branches. Releases organization_slot.
Body: { new_parent_id: uuid | null, reason?: string }. Enforces same-tenant + no-cycle + within-depth-cap. Fires OrganizationParentChanged + dispatches RebuildTreePathsJob.
Flip is_default=true on the target row. Auto-demotes the current default in the same transaction. Body: { reason?: string }.
Body: { reason?: string }. Refused on is_default.
Reverse of pause. Only valid from status=paused.
Body: { reason?: string }. Explicit archive route (in addition to DELETE) so tenants that use DELETE for other semantics can still archive.
The subtree rooted at this Organization (self + all descendants). Cheaper than /tree when a caller only cares about a specific branch.

groups.name: platform-organizations
groups.description: Platform-admin cross-tenant Organization observability. Read-only in v1. Any write must go through the tenant-plane so provenance is captured.

routes.description: Cross-tenant list. filter[tenant_id], filter[status], filter[category], filter[has_descendants] supported. Aggregations at the top: { total_rows, per_tenant_max, per_tenant_p95, tree_depth_max }.
Full detail including sensitive columns (`notes`, `contact_person_name`) that are hidden from tenant-plane responses.
Subtree rooted at the given Organization. Support tool for diagnosing tenant-reported hierarchy issues.
